title: Cancer: MedlinePlus
text:
But some lifestyle habits may increase your risk of certain types of cancer. Avoid or reduce lifestyle habits such as:
Smoking and tobacco use 
Having too much sun exposure 
Drinking too much alcohol 
Not getting enough physical activity 
Having obesity
